title: Chio HTTP Session Init
description: Initial session-establishment payload exchanged over the chio-http edge when a remote MCP client begins a Streamable-HTTP session. NOTE: As of M01 there is no single serde-derived `SessionInit` struct; the wire shape is assembled inline by the edge from the JSON-RPC `initialize` request (`crates/chio-mcp-edge/src/runtime.rs` around the `negotiate_protocol_version` and initialize-result paths near lines 287-1077) and the in-process construction value object `RemoteSessionInit` in `crates/chio-cli/src/remote_mcp/session_core.rs` lines 497-517 (no serde derive; not on the wire). This schema captures the externally-observable fields the edge accepts at session creation time. Re-pinning is expected once M07/M10 lock the cross-cluster session contract.

session_id.description: Unique session identifier assigned to the new session. Mirrors `RemoteSessionInit::session_id`.

agent_id.description: Agent identifier the session is bound to. Mirrors `RemoteSessionInit::agent_id`.

auth_context.description: Authentication context captured at session creation. Mirrors `chio_core::session::SessionAuthContext` (transport, method, origin). Sub-shape pinned by chio-core; treated as opaque object here pending dedicated chio-http schema.

auth_mode_fingerprint.description: Optional opaque fingerprint of the auth-mode configuration used to establish this session. Mirrors `RemoteSessionInit::auth_mode_fingerprint` (Option<String>).

policy_fingerprint.description: Optional fingerprint of the policy bundle in force when the session was created. Mirrors `RemoteSessionInit::policy_fingerprint` (Option<String>).

hosted_isolation.description: Hosted-isolation mode for the session. Mirrors the serde-rename_all=snake_case enum `RemoteHostedIsolationMode` in `crates/chio-cli/src/remote_mcp/session_core.rs` lines 366-372.

protocol_version.description: Negotiated MCP protocol version returned by `negotiate_protocol_version`. Mirrors `RemoteSessionInit::protocol_version`.

peer_capabilities.description: Capabilities advertised by the peer during the JSON-RPC `initialize` exchange. Mirrors `chio_core::session::PeerCapabilities`; treated as opaque object here pending dedicated peer-capabilities schema.

initialize_params.description: Verbatim JSON-RPC `initialize` params object as supplied by the client. Mirrors `RemoteSessionInit::initialize_params` (Option<serde_json::Value>); required at session-init time on the wire.

capabilities.description: Capabilities granted to the session at creation. Mirrors `RemoteSessionInit::capabilities` (Vec<RemoteSessionCapability>); element shape pinned by chio-core.

issued_capabilities.description: Capability tokens issued to the session at creation. Mirrors `RemoteSessionInit::issued_capabilities` (Vec<chio_core::capability::CapabilityToken>); element shape pinned by chio-wire/v1/capability/token.schema.json.
